title: Rolling
point: Rolling is plastic deformation of metal by passing between rolls.

title: Draft
point: Draft = H − h.

title: Spread
point: Spread = b − B.

title: Elongation
point: Elongation = l − L.

title: Reduction
point: Reduction = A − a.

title: Coefficient of Reduction
point: Coefficient of Reduction = A/a.

title: Rolling Constant
point: Volume remains constant before and after rolling.

title: Yield
point: Yield = Output ×100 / Input.

title: Hot Rolling
point: Performed above recrystallization temperature.

title: Cold Rolling
point: Performed below recrystallization temperature.
